title: Tarken
content:
{{Top|leg|italics=1}}
'''''Tarken''''' was a [[Nebulon-B2 frigate]] belonging to the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]]. The ''Tarken'' attempted rescue the Rebel [[MC80 Star Cruiser/Legends|MC80 Star Cruiser]] ''[[Knights]]'' which was captured during a meeting with [[Bothan/Legends|Bothans]] in a [[Dreadnaught-class heavy cruiser/Legends|''Dreadnaught''-class heavy cruiser]] called [[Doomer]]. The Tarken was disabled and captured as well, by [[Gamma-class ATR-6 assault transport|''Gamma''-class ATR-6 assault transports]] with the assistance of [[Tan (title)|Tan]] [[Maarek Stele/Legends|Maarek Stele]].
